endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Features/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Features REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Features/features
endpoints.description: Gets all the preview features that are available through AFEC for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Features/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/features
endpoints.description: Gets all the preview features in a provider namespace that are available through AFEC for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Features/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/features/{featureName}
endpoints.description: Gets the preview feature with the specified name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{FEATURENAME}} with a real featurename. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Features/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/features/{featureName}/register
endpoints.description: Registers the preview feature for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{FEATURENAME}} with a real featurename. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace.
